problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
